p.c: function[T0: lib(field).Field, T1: lib(field).Field](x0: T0 -> T1) { lib(ring_hom).is_ring_hom[T0, T1](x0) = is_field_hom[T0, T1](x0) }[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn)

function[T0: lib(field).Field, T1: lib(field).Field](x0: T0 -> T1) { not FieldHom.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: FieldHom[T0, T1]) { FieldHom.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[FieldHom[T0, T1]](k0) } }[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn)

goal: exists(k0: FieldHom[Complex, Complex]) { FieldHom.new[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn) = Option.some(k0) }

p.c: let w0: Complex satisfy { complex_conj_field_hom.hom(w0) != complex_conj_fn(w0) }

function[T0: lib(field).Field, T1: lib(field).Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[FieldHom[T0, T1]](x0) != FieldHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_field_hom, complex_conj_fn, w0)
function[T0: lib(field).Field, T1: lib(field).Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1]) { FieldHom.new[T0, T1](x0.hom) = Option.some[FieldHom[T0, T1]](x0) }[Complex, Complex](f)
function[T0: lib(field).Field, T1: lib(field).Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1]) { FieldHom.new[T0, T1](x0.hom) = Option.some[FieldHom[T0, T1]](x0) }[Complex, Complex](g)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { Option.some[T0](x0) != Option.some[T0](x1) or x0 = x1 }[FieldHom[Complex, Complex]](f, g)

goal: compose_field_hom[Complex, Complex, Complex](complex_conj_field_hom, complex_conj_field_hom).hom = compose[Complex, Complex, Complex](complex_conj_field_hom.hom, complex_conj_field_hom.hom)
compose_field_hom[Complex, Complex, Complex](complex_conj_field_hom, complex_conj_field_hom).hom = compose[Complex, Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn, complex_conj_fn)
